mapper.insert: INSERT INTO article SET regDate = NOW(), updateDate = NOW(), memberId = #{memberId}, boardId = #{boardId}, title = #{title}, `body` = #{body}
mapper.update: UPDATE article SET hitCount = hitCount + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM article WHERE 1
AND boardId = #{boardId}
AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND `body` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR `body` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')

SELECT A.*, m.nickname AS extra__writer, IFNULL(SUM(IF(RP.point > 0, RP.point, 0)),0) AS extra__goodPoint, IFNULL(SUM(IF(RP.point < 0, RP.point, 0)),0) AS extra__badPoint FROM article AS A INNER JOIN `member` AS M ON A.memberId = M.id LEFT JOIN reactionPoint AS RP ON A.id = RP.relId AND RP.relTypeCode = 'article' WHERE A.id = #{id};

SELECT A.*, M.nickname AS extra__writer, IFNULL(SUM(RP.point),0) AS extra__sumPoint FROM article AS A INNER JOIN `member` AS M ON A.memberId = M.id LEFT JOIN reactionPoint AS RP ON A.id = RP.relId AND RP.relTypeCode = 'article' WHERE 1
AND boardId = #{boardId}
AND A.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND A.`body` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND A.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND A.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR A.`body` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
GROUP BY A.id ORDER BY A.id DESC
LIMIT #{limitFrom}, #{limitTake}
SELECT A.*, M.nickname AS extra__writer FROM article AS A INNER JOIN `member` AS M ON A.memberId = M.id ORDER BY A.id DESC
